name: Carleton College
meets_full_need_notes: Carleton meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Carleton includes a modest self-help (loan + work-study) component in packages. While loans are included, Carleton has reduced loan amounts over time. No full loan-elimination policy as of 2025-26.
ed_aid_implications: Carleton's ED applicants receive the same need-based aid as RD applicants. Students uncomfortable with the aid offer may request to be released from the ED commitment.
appeal_policy: Appeals accepted for changed financial circumstances. Contact Student Financial Services with updated documentation.
